CancelJob.name: CancelJob
CancelJob.description: This action cancels a specified job. Only the job owner can cancel it. The action fails if the job has already started or is complete.

CreateJob.name: CreateJob
CreateJob.description: This action initiates the process of scheduling an upload or download of your data.

GetShippingLabel.name: GetShippingLabel
GetShippingLabel.description: This action generates a pre-paid shipping label that you will use to ship your device to AWS for processing.

GetStatus.name: GetStatus
GetStatus.description: This action returns information about a job, including where the job is in the processing pipeline, the status of the results, and the signature value associated with the job.

ListJobs.name: ListJobs
ListJobs.description: This action returns the jobs associated with the requester.

UpdateJob.name: UpdateJob
UpdateJob.description: You use this action to change the parameters specified in the original manifest file by supplying a new manifest file.
